definitions.text: To be contingent or conditioned; to have something as a necessary condition .mw-parser-output .object-usage-tag{font-style:italic}.mw-parser-output .deprecated{color:var(--wikt-palette-grey-lime-8,olivedrab)}[with on or upon; or with of]
examples: We would like to go skiing, but it depends on the amount of snow.

definitions.text: To trust; to have confidence; to rely. [with on or upon ]
examples: we should all be able to depend on the word or assurance of our friends
we depend on the mailman to come at the usual time.
